text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the<n>academy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-a-at this rate, Opera O is going to—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I just performed a divination<n>predicting that a
catastrophic disaster,<n>too terrible for words to
describe, will<n>befall Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-we have to find her right now and<n>get her to
safety! We can't waste<n>any time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's you two! Your timing couldn't<n>have been
any better! Why, I was<n>just about to start
rehearsing an<n>all-new opera!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
P-please, you have to listen! Disaster<n>will soon
strike! You have to get to<n>somewhere safe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Disaster? Ha ha ha! Pray tell—what<n>exactly is this
impending disaster you<n>speak of?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-it's um... one that goes whamand swoosh, like crash, anduh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A horrendous fortune poised to<n>wreak
cataclysmic levels of havoc is<n>upon you! With a
bonus of blizzards,<n>lightning, volcanic eruptions,
even...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Fear not! Such measly<n>threats will only
serve to enhance my<n>performance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, let those grim thoughts burden<n>you no
further. Join me on stage, and<n>allow me to win
back your lovely<n>smiles with my brilliance.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay... Oh, what's this... wonderful<n>feeling?
This ray of light I feel in my<n>chest, driving away
my fears.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Wait! Th-th-th-that's not right!<n>Ohhh... How are
we supposed to save<n>Opera O now?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I just performed<n>another divination
and have now<n>discovered a way to save her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To cut to the chase—we must fight evil<n>with evil...
Doto, you must become a<n>demon!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A d-demon?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You must become a demon far<n>more
terrifying than any catastrophe,<n>and then frighten
Opera O into hiding!<n>Can you do this?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I can! If it means Opera O will be<n>saved, I'll do
anything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Then, I shall call upon a<n>demon to
possess your body! Hold<n>these incense sticks
with both hands<n>and keep this slab of butter plus
this<n>rice cracker in your mouth.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hummm... Dracula caterpillar specter...<n>Crying
carrot, flappy fried rice!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Doot! ...Installing—Demon.exe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, what is the matter? Don't be<n>shy, come
here and—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...I, I am no Doto! Da-dum! I am a<n>yokai—wait no,
an evil tanuki<n>possessing this girl's body!
Da-dum!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Another adorable little<n>tanuki wants to
make friends!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll put a curse on you if you don't<n>leave right
now! I'll give you a<n>tanuki's tail, or... I'll turn you
into a<n>tea kettle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a tale of shapeshifting, I see! Ha<n>ha ha! You
have my attention!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-no... Y-you should fear me! I have<n>even more
terrible curses up my<n>sleeve, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-this girl here, she might never be<n>able to see
your beautiful face<n>anymore, you know?! I-if that
happens... she's gonna be very sad!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? Dear Tanuki, do you mean that<n>you can
sense Doto's trepidation?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-of course! She's so worried! If youdon't run away soon, her heart'sgonna... sniffle... burst!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Duly noted! After all, it is<n>true that a
curtain of darkness would<n>fall upon this world if
anything were<n>to happen to me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Y-you're going to go?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I shall heed your warning and<n>take my
leave. Adieu!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank goodness! Opera O is saved!
choice_data_list: Looks to me like you got your message across.
Looks to me like you got your message across.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank goodness! Opera O is saved!
choice_data_list: Looks to me like you got your message across.
Looks to me like you got your message across.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh? Are you saying... the demon<n>had no
effect on Opera O's<n>decision-making?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I-in any case, I'm glad she's<n>fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! Speaking of which, Trainer...<n>Aren't you
standing right where<n>Opera O was a moment
ago?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That's when a bicycle furiously<n>speeds by me,
going right over the<n>puddle of water next to
where I'm<n>standing.

text_block_list.name: Doto and Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Showered in muddy water and stares<n>of pity, I
come to terms with my<n>misfortune.
